query:
SELECT id, programId, title, slotDate, DAYOFWEEK(slotDate) as dow, maxParticipants, currentParticipants, isAvailable
FROM schedule_slots
ORDER BY slotDate
LIMIT 30;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user mUSTnZHSjH9Rc4V.ee5fccb85a53 --database kzZFsCRUb4iWMZR8LEwAKz --execute
